meta.title: About Draivix - Aidvertaiser
meta.description: Learn about Draivix Corporation, the AI-focused software company behind Aidvertaiser. Meet our leadership team, explore partnerships, and discover career opportunities.

hero.subtitle: Building AI-powered advertising tools that make every marketing team more productive. From campaign management to cross-platform analytics, we automate what matters most.

company.title: The Company
company.p1: Draivix Corporation is an AI-focused software company building tools that automate and optimize digital advertising at scale. Our flagship product, Aidvertaiser, brings AI-powered advertising management to marketing teams of every size through the Model Context Protocol.
company.p2: Founded by David Strejc, Draivix is driven by a simple belief: managing advertising across multiple platforms should not require switching between dozens of dashboards. We combine the MCP protocol with deep platform integrations to give AI assistants full control over your advertising ecosystem.
company.aidvertaiserDesc: AI-powered advertising MCP server. 180 tools across Google Ads, Meta Ads, GA4, Search Console, Matomo, and Bing Webmaster. Open source under MIT.
company.platformDesc: The broader Draivix ecosystem of AI-powered developer and marketing tools, infrastructure automation, and intelligent workflows designed for modern teams.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.intro: Draivix is led by engineers and marketers who believe AI should augment team capabilities, not replace them.
leadership.founderBio: AI researcher and full-stack developer with deep expertise in advertising technology, API integrations, and developer tooling. David founded Draivix to bring AI-powered advertising management to every marketing team, combining the MCP protocol with comprehensive platform APIs.

vision.title: Vision & Mission
vision.mission: Make AI-powered advertising management accessible to every marketing team. Campaign optimization should not be a luxury reserved for companies with dedicated ad operations teams.
vision.vision: A world where every marketing team has an AI co-pilot. Where campaign creation, budget optimization, and performance analysis happen through natural conversation. Where AI and human creativity work together to make advertising better.

partners.title: Technology Partners
partners.intro: Aidvertaiser integrates with world-class advertising and analytics platforms. We build on official APIs to ensure reliable, secure, and compliant advertising management.

careers.title: Join Us
careers.intro: We are always looking for passionate developers, marketers, and open source contributors who want to push the boundaries of AI-powered advertising tools.
careers.benefit1Desc: Work on AI-powered advertising tools that push the boundaries of what marketing technology can do.
careers.benefit2Desc: Work from anywhere in the world. We are a distributed team that values output over office hours.
careers.benefit3Desc: Your work ships as open source. Contribute to the marketing community while building your career.
careers.benefit4Desc: Small team, big impact. Ship features weekly, not quarterly. Your ideas go from concept to production fast.
careers.ossDesc: Aidvertaiser is open source under the MIT License. Contribute platform integrations, tools, or documentation. Every pull request makes the tool better for the entire community.

events.title: Events
events.intro: Join us at upcoming conferences, webinars, and community meetups where we demonstrate Aidvertaiser and discuss the future of AI-powered advertising.

stories.title: Customer Stories
stories.intro: Marketing teams around the world use Aidvertaiser to manage advertising campaigns with AI. Here are some of their experiences.
stories.quote1: Aidvertaiser let us launch coordinated campaigns across Google and Meta in minutes instead of hours. The AI handles the repetitive setup while we focus on creative strategy.
stories.quote2: We integrated Aidvertaiser into our analytics workflow and now pull cross-platform reports with a single natural language command. It saved our team 15 hours per week.
stories.quote3: The conversion tracking tools unified our pixel management across platforms. We caught attribution gaps we didn't know existed and improved ROAS by 23%.

press.title: Press & Media
press.intro: For press inquiries, media resources, and company information, please reach out to our communications team.
press.inquiriesDesc: For interviews, product reviews, and media coverage.
press.resourcesDesc: Logos, screenshots, and company fact sheet for media use.

investors.title: Investor Relations
investors.desc: Draivix Corporation is a privately held company. For investor inquiries and partnership opportunities, please contact us at investors@aidvertaiser.com.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: Have questions about Aidvertaiser, want to discuss a partnership, or need enterprise support? We would love to hear from you.

cta.title: Start Managing Ads with AI
cta.desc: Install Aidvertaiser in seconds and connect your first platform. Open source, MIT licensed, forever free.
